Teams.title: Ngaahi Timi
Teams.noTeamsDescription: ʻOku teʻeki ai ke ke kau ki ha timi. ʻOku fakafouʻi e ngaahi timi mei he Planning Center.

Goals.title: Taumuʻa mo e Fakamatala
Goals.noActiveGoalsDesc: Ngaohi ha taumuʻa foʻou ke kamata muimui ki hoʻo ola.
Goals.noFeedbackDesc: Ko e fakamatala mei he kau taki timi ʻe hā mai ʻi heni.
